name: Supervisor, Manufacturing
description: Job Description: 1. Process Improvement & Digitalization – NGBA steering & associated improvements As the global point of contact for G-EDM Manufacturing processes, lead & participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to different production sites. Guide production site leads across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalizing process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes, IT environment, and best practices to drive further development and alignment. 2. Change Management – Technical & Organizational Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Manufacturing. Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 3. Stakeholder Management & Global Co-ordination Provide regular updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in Manufacturing. Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Manufacturing topics. Build an internal G-EDM Manufacturing expert community. Job Description Footer:

name: Supervisor, Quality Management_PS&R
description: Job Description: 1. Process Improvement & Digitalization - NGBA steering & associated improvements: As the global point of contact for G-EDM Quality Management and PS&R processes, lead & participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to QM and PS&R. Guide functional leads across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalize process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes, IT environment, and align with best practices. 2. Change Management - Technical & Organizational: Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Quality Management and PS&R. Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 3. Stakeholder Management & Global Coordination: Provide updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in Quality Management and PS&R. Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Quality Management and PS&R topics. Build internal G-EDM Quality Management and PS&R expert community. Job Description Footer:

name: Supervisor, Transport Management
description: Job Description: 1. Strategic business engagement: Participate in the development and implementation of G-EDM's business strategy, process improvements, and digitalization initiatives. Enhance business competitiveness by introducing new concepts and establishing expert networks. Advocate for process improvements and digitalization to relevant stakeholders. 2. Process Improvement & Digitalization - NGBA steering & associated improvements: As the global point of contact for G-EDM Transport Management processes, lead & participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to all modes of transportation. Guide Supply Chain team members across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalize process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes, IT environment, and align with best practices. 3. Change Management - Technical & Organizational: Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Transportation Management. Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 4. Stakeholder Management & Global Coordination: Provide updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in planning in Transportation Management. Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Transportation Management topics. Build internal G-EDM Logistics & Transport Management expert community. Job Description Footer:

name: Manager, Order to Invoice (OTI)
description: Job Description: 1. Strategic business engagement: Participate in the development and implementation of G-EDM's business strategy, process improvements, and digitalization initiatives. Enhance business competitiveness by introducing new concepts and establishing expert networks. Advocate for process improvements and digitalization to relevant stakeholders. 2. Process Improvement & Digitalization - NGBA steering & associated improvements: As the global point of contact for G-EDM Order to Invoice (OTI) processes, lead & participate in the development, optimization and automation of processes related to OTI domain. Guide Customer Service Leads across countries to define the NGBA end-state solution and finalize process models. Conduct regular analysis of existing processes and IT environment for further development. 3. Change Management - Technical & Organizational: Identify global/country specific features and enable NGBA workshops for Order to Invoice (OTI). Drive role-based training for users across G-EDM. Develop user documentation, process descriptions, guidelines, and procedural instructions. 4. Stakeholder Management & Global Coordination: Provide updates to key stakeholders on NGBA implementation progress, achievements, and improvements in Order to Invoice (OTI). Represent G-EDM in business experts' communities and NGBA forums for Order to Invoice (OTI) topics. Build internal G-EDM Order to Invoice (OTI) expert community. Job Description Footer:
